_schema.purpose: Factual per-provider fields for the Q2 untracked-provider states and the 'cheapest model you'd consider' exclusion UI (CTO update v2, 0.2 + A4). FACTS ONLY — open_weights, hosted_api, hq_jurisdiction — no suitability opinions, no eval scores. The 'can be run in-house / low price-jump risk' reading renders ONLY when open_weights is true; every other untracked provider gets the neutral 'not tracked — no forecast' state with no risk rating implied either way.
_schema.verification: open_weights = the provider's current surfaced model(s) have publicly downloadable weights (source_url). Grok 3 verified hosted/API-only on 2026-07-10 (only Grok-1 weights were ever released).

google.label: Google
google.note: Gemini API models are hosted; the separate Gemma family is open-weights but is not in this price sheet.

xai.label: xAI
xai.note: Grok 3 is hosted/API-only — only Grok-1 weights were released (2024). Verified 2026-07-10; this is the fact that fixes the 'open-source, run in-house' misread.

mistral.label: Mistral
mistral.note: Mistral 3 family (incl. Large 3) released under Apache 2.0 — confirmed 2026-07-11.

together.label: Together
together.note: Hosting provider; the surfaced model (LFM2 24B, by Liquid AI, US) is open-weights.
